message:
test(btree): add count_all_rows regression tests for empty, root-only, and multi-leaf trees

bd-wwqen.1: verify count_all_rows correctness across three tree shapes:
- Empty table: must return 0
- Root-only (single leaf, 5 rows): must return exact count
- Multi-leaf (~25 pages, 500 rows with 200-byte payloads): must return
  exact count after page splits
- Post-count cursor usability: verify table_move_to(1) still finds the
  row after count_all_rows completes, ensuring the leaf-header-walking
  optimization leaves the cursor in a reusable state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
